title: Publish v0.1 catalog release (CC BY 4.0)
context: The v0.1 release is the first public open catalog: >=30 models, 100% provenance and license-cleared, CI green, and re-id review signed (PLAN M1, section 8). Depends on ingests/resolver/CI (007-010) and the re-id gate (004). Binding cancer guardrails (PLAN section 7): open-access/aggregate/de-identified metadata only; no controlled-access (dbGaP/EGA) or patient-identifiable data; COSMIC/OncoKB reference-only (not ingested); provenance on every assertion; links only, no omics/sequence/image payloads re-hosted; no medical advice. No partner/requestor secured yet, so verifiedNeed is false.
objective: Publish the v0.1 catalog (>=30 models) as catalog.json + catalog.csv + provenance.json + CHANGELOG under CC BY 4.0 with a signed re-id review.
acceptanceCriteria: >=30 models, 100% provenance + license-cleared, CI green, re-id review signed.
catalog.json + catalog.csv + provenance.json + CHANGELOG tagged under CC BY 4.0.
output: output/ v0.1 release: catalog.json + catalog.csv + provenance.json + CHANGELOG (CC BY 4.0), with signed reid-review.
